mapper.sql: id, canonical_symbol, trade_date, adjust_type, data_source, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_daily_bar (canonical_symbol, trade_date, adjust_type, data_source, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount) VALUES (#{canonicalSymbol}, #{tradeDate}, #{adjustType}, #{dataSource}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{volume}, #{amount})

INSERT INTO stock_daily_bar (canonical_symbol, trade_date, adjust_type, data_source, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount) VALUES
(#{item.canonicalSymbol}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.adjustType}, #{item.dataSource}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount})
